message:
Extract Tailscale remote URL banner into standalone render function

Refactor the inline Tailscale remote-access URL banner rendering from
SystemHealthScreen::render into a dedicated render_remote_url_banner()
function. The new function takes the frame, area, and diagnostics
snapshot, renders the banner line if a Tailscale URL is present, and
returns the remaining content area. No behavioral change; purely a
readability/maintainability extraction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
